prompt:
A compact modern smartphone lying on a clean workbench next to a USB-C cable, shown from a three-quarter angle so the slim profile and 6-inch screen are clear. The screen is on but displays only abstract, non-text shapes and soft gradients (no readable UI), emphasizing the device as a general-purpose tool with a rechargeable battery and modern port.

Ultra-detailed, photorealistic 512×512 image with a grounded near-future solarpunk gadget aesthetic: soft studio lighting, realistic glass and metal reflections, no logos, no readable text, and a simple uncluttered background. Center the phone so it reads instantly as an inventory icon.
